verdict_reason: BG 2.72's tags are operator-system-coupling, team-state, non-attachment-to-praise. CROSS-REFERENCE WITH SAME-TAG VERSES: (a) operator-system-coupling is shared with 2.48, 2.68, 2.69, 2.70 — 2.72 closes the chapter's argument that operator-state can be structurally decoupled from system-state across a career. COMPATIBLE — 2.72 is the terminal verse of the doctrine 2.48 began. (b) team-state is shared with 2.48, 2.68, 2.69, 2.70 — 2.72 names the career-state-stability that the prior verses have been describing rung-by-rung. COMPATIBLE — 2.72 is the closing rung. (c) non-attachment-to-praise is shared with 2.70, 2.71 — 2.72 closes the chapter's argument that praise (CEO names her in all-hands; conference invitations; recruiter outreach) does not move the level. COMPATIBLE — 2.72 is the terminal scope of 2.70's ocean and 2.71's nirmama / nirahaṅkāra. CROSS-REFERENCES: 2.72 explicitly references the chapter's whole arc from 2.11 to 2.71, which is structurally correct (this is the chapter's CLOSING back-reference) and supported by the source pack's traditional_meaning_consensus across all three traditions. The chapter-coherence is at its strongest at this verse — every prior thread closes here. Pass on both 6.1 and 6.5.
